days.title: Arrival and Marina Bay Intro
days.weather: Partly cloudy with a chance of afternoon thunderstorms, 26°C/30°C.
activities: Check into hotel near Marina Bay or City Hall.
Visit the Marina Bay Sands Skypark Observation Deck for sunset views.
Walk along the Gardens by the Bay Promenade.
days.budgetNote: Low cost entry for walking areas; budget for Observation Deck ticket (~SGD 33).

days.title: Sentosa Adventure Day
activities: Take the Sentosa Express or Cable Car from downtown.
Visit Universal Studios Singapore for full-day exploration.
Evening at Imbiah Lookout for panoramic views.
days.budgetNote: Major expense day. USS tickets ~SGD 110. Budget carefully for meals on the island.

days.title: Viva City and Beach Relaxation
activities: Explore VivoCity mall and its rooftop garden.
Take the Sentosa Bus to beaches like Siloso or Tanjong Beach.
Enjoy seafood dinner at Siloso Beach Walk.
days.budgetNote: Moderate spending on beach activities and dining. Free entry to VivoCity.

days.title: Cultural Heritage Tour
activities: Explore Little India and Tekka Centre.
Walk through Chinatown and visit Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.
days.budgetNote: Low cost day. Temples are free; budget for street food and souvenirs.

days.title: Shopping and Departure Prep
activities: Final shopping at Orchard Road or ION Orchard.
Visit the ArtScience Museum at Marina Bay Sands.
days.budgetNote: Budget for last-minute shopping and airport transfer (~SGD 20).

categories.name: Clothing
items: Lightweight pants for temple visits (knees covered)
Light jacket or cardigan for heavy air-conditioning

categories.name: Electronics
items: Universal power adapter (Singapore uses Type G)

categories.name: Accessories
items: Hat or cap for sun protection

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Singapore Dollar cash for street food and tips
